name: Routes list: filter by starred and tag (API + UI)
description: Layer annotation-aware filtering on top of the route-list-filters feature. Users should be able to jump to "only my starred routes" or "only routes tagged road-trip" from the same filter bar they already use for date/duration/etc. This is a small delta on both ends (a couple of query params, a star checkbox, and a tag selector) so it is bundled into a single feature that touches backend and frontend.
acceptance_criteria: GET /v1/route/:dongle_id accepts starred=true|false and tag=<name> (repeatable: ?tag=a&tag=b means has all of these tags, documented in the handler); tag values are normalized (lowercased+trimmed) before matching.

The underlying sqlc query is extended so: starred=true filters to routes.starred=true, starred=false is equivalent to routes.starred=false, and each tag= adds an EXISTS subquery against route_tags (so multi-tag is an AND, not an OR).
Handler tests cover: starred=true, starred=false, single tag, multi-tag AND, unknown tag returns empty set (no error), combined with existing filters (e.g. starred=true&from=...).

The filter bar in web/src/app/routes/page.tsx gains a Starred-only checkbox and a Tags multi-select (chip picker populated from GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/tags); selecting tags narrows the list, starred toggles route.starred.
URL querystring sync includes the new params; Clear filters wipes them along with the rest.
go test ./internal/api/..., go vet ./..., pnpm --dir web lint, pnpm --dir web type-check, and pnpm --dir web test pass.
